element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Complete course within time limit, collect time bonuses
Wreck/damage competitor cars to gain time, eliminate all opponents as alternative win condition
Running over pedestrians gains time bonuses and points; killing all pedestrians serves as alternative win condition
City, mine, and industrial area settings present different spatial navigation challenges

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Continuous multi-objective tension with frequent relief opportunities; players manage three distinct win conditions (course completion, wreck all cars, kill all pedestrians) creating variable pacing based on chosen strategy

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to three win condition types across varied environment types

notable_level_patterns.description: Each race can be won through any of three distinct paths: completing the course normally (traditional racing), wrecking all opponent cars (combat focus), or killing all pedestrians (destruction focus). This creates flexible difficulty and multiple mastery paths.
36 tracks distributed across 11 distinct settings (city, mine, industrial areas, and others) to provide spatial and thematic variation while maintaining core vehicular combat mechanics
